Vendored asset for the wallet receive QR feature:

- Package: `qrcode-generator`
- Version: `1.4.4`
- Source: `https://unpkg.com/qrcode-generator@1.4.4/qrcode.js`
- License: `MIT` (also noted in the vendored source header)

This file is loaded directly by the static frontend to render wallet receive QR codes client-side without a build step or third-party image service.
